arts.ttl: Liverpool, PSG’s Official Starting XI for Champions League Clash
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain are welcoming Liverpool to the Parc des Princes on Wednesday night. The Parisians are full of confidence and are hoping that can fuel them to secure an advantage before the scene shifts to Anfield next week. arts.ttl: Bayern Munich Reacts to PSG’s Bold Offer for Arsenal, Inter Milan Target as Key Details Emerge
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain have been closely monitoring Bayern Munich midfielder Joshua Kimmich for months, nearly signing him last summer. Now, they are once again pushing and have reportedly made an offer. Journalist Christian Falk’s latest report on Kimmich’s future reveals that the veteran has received a solid offer from PSG. arts.sum: Liverpool face a Paris St-Germain side in the Champions League who are hitting their best form of the post-Kylian Mbappe era.

arts.ttl: Paris Saint-Germain v Liverpool: Champions League last 16, first leg – live
arts.sum: Live updates from Parc des Princes, kick-off 8pm (GMT) Clockwatch: Bayern v Leverkusen and more | Email Scott There’s no Cody Gakpo for Liverpool. He’s picked up an injury in training. The only change to the team that started last week’s 2-0 victory over Newcastle United is at left-back, where Andrew Robertson returns at the expense of Kostas Tsimikas, who drops to the bench. The hosts PSG make three changes to the starting XI after last Saturday’s 4-1 Ligue 1 thumping of Lille. Vitinha, Khvicha Kvaratskhelia and Willian Pacho return, with Gonçalo Ramos, Désiré Doué and Lucas Beraldo dropping to the bench. Continue reading...
